creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 206177
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support cliqz-1.28.0 builds.

Cliqz has been updated from version 1.27.4 to 1.28.0.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building cliqz-1.28.0.

Notes about the patch

* Removes files/patch-bug1530098 since this is no longer applicable to 1.28.0
